title: taraxacum wallonicum
intro: Taraxacum wallonicum, also known as the Wall's dandelion or lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to Europe. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Taraxacum wallonicum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
